Notes: Scotty Wood Tournament at Muhlenberg College (first round)
Kathleen Daly ties career-high with 14 points as Scranton overcomes 8-point
halftime deficit to defeat New Paltz, 61-52
Game.Officials: Ron Moser,  Dennis Schantzenbach,  Joe Murphy
